message:
fix(mobile): wave10 — chat min-h, orientation guard, hover-touch, safe-area (#6549)

- #6538 MissionChat messages container: add min-h-[150px] so empty state doesn't collapse
- #6540 Sidebar: strict hidden md:flex guard when mobile sidebar closed (orientation flip)
- #6541 FlightPlanBlueprint: main row flex-col md:flex-row so SVG + info panel stack on mobile
- #6542 Sidebar action icons: opacity-100 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 (touch visible, desktop hover-reveal)
- #6545 MissionChat input row: pb-[max(1rem,env(safe-area-inset-bottom))] for iOS home indicator

Skipped (drifted / already fixed):
- #6544 Sidebar:626 resizer already has hidden md:block + !isMobile guard
- #6543 AgentStatusIndicator label already uses hidden sm:inline; no tooltip wrapper to hide

Fixes #6538
Fixes #6540
Fixes #6541
Fixes #6542
Fixes #6545

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -503,7 +503,7 @@ export function MissionChat({ mission, isFullScreen = false, fontSize = 'base' a
       <div
         ref={messagesContainerRef}
         onScroll={handleScroll}
-        className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto scroll-enhanced p-4 space-y-4 min-h-0 min-w-0"
+        className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto scroll-enhanced p-4 space-y-4 min-h-[150px] min-w-0"
       >
         {/* Inline Run button + editable mission description/steps for saved missions (#3917, #4273) */}
         {isSavedPreRun && (
@@ -797,7 +797,7 @@ export function MissionChat({ mission, isFullScreen = false, fontSize = 'base' a
 
       {/* Input / Actions — hidden when Run button is inline above */}
       {!isSavedPreRun && (
-      <div className="p-4 border-t border-border flex-shrink-0 bg-card min-w-0">
+      <div className="p-4 border-t border-border flex-shrink-0 bg-card min-w-0 pb-[max(1rem,env(safe-area-inset-bottom))]">
         {mission.status === 'cancelling' ? (
           <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-3">
             <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin text-orange-400" />
